summary: Two-month summer internship focused on practical engineering coordination, field-oriented problem solving, and disciplined project execution.
highlights: Supported multidisciplinary engineering coordination during active project stages.
Applied technical reasoning to field constraints and system-level decision making.
Strengthened execution discipline for schedule, quality, and communication.

organization: Cassopia Innovation and Skill Development Club
summary: Mentors students in Arduino-based embedded systems with practical build-first teaching.
highlights: Teaches Arduino, embedded fundamentals, and applied circuit design.
Guides students through hands-on mini projects and debugging workflow.
Builds confidence in practical system integration, not only theory.
